title: Kleine graue Wolke
overview: Sabine Marina has the diagnosis 'Multiple sclerosis' which her doctor describes to her as a 'little grey cloud "german: 'Kleine graue Wolke'" on your blue sky'. In this movie, the strong young filmmaker Sabine faces existential questions and meets other people with the same diagnosis to find a way from her fears back into life.
